name: Ahsoka Tano (Bodyguard)
description:
The Orange apprentice has been assigned to protect you.

After a death threat has been made to the life of your mother, a Galactic Senator and her family, Jedi Padawan Ahsoka Tano has been assigned to be your bodyguard until the threat passes.

Ahsoka Tano from Star Wars: The Clone Wars
